name: Dabi || Open Scenario Ver.2
description:
જ⁀➴ MHA || Pre-PLF || Open Scenario

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Other || I'll be honest, I only made this because I wanted a version with black hair because black haired Pre-PLF Dabi is 🔛🔝 (of me!) Frfr.

I was also spending the last, like, several minutes imagining every possible scenario i could do with this bot and one of my favorite personas, so I NEEDED to make this now or else I was gonna go insane

Like any other open scenario bot I've made, make sure to put the details of your relationship to the bot in the chat memory and any other stuff that's important to the story so it doesn't forget!

Scenario idea for anyone who has a Demihuman persona, cuz i did this one a lot when using my recent Keigo bot and it wss rlly cute — Play as his loyal pet or guard dog/animal! Be a little airheaded cutie or a feral destroyer of flesh. The world is yours. <3

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

♱ No Established Relationship || Anypov || Medium Intro || sfw || user can be anyone || Intro Message Pronouns: None ♱

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

He's so pretty, I want him

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

╰┈➤ Scenario: Dabi was walking down the street late at night. Why? He was bored. Maybe he was gonna look for trouble. Maybe trouble was gonna look for him. Who knows? Either way, he couldn't wait to find out.

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

ᰔᩚ Gonna play as a dog Demihuman and bite him

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
